HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[app-credentials] Reviewing application and service-principal authentication material, federated trust, and visible current-identity control paths.
ho-azure app-credentials

│2 visible scopes.                                                    │

Current-scope issues:
- note: Static fixture data includes 5 representative app-credential rows for deterministic testing.

Takeaway: 5 app-credential row(s) visible; 1 direct federated-trust control path(s), 2 direct credential-control path(s), 1 existing federated trust row(s), 1 existing credential row(s).
